_meta.description: Modular product-producer lookup index that resolves to existing entity IDs only.
_meta.confidence: heuristic + public research + off-bulk db aggregation
_meta.researchFocus: UPC-heavy parent producers and major shelf brands found in stores; keep brand aliases tied to parent-company candidates.
researchNotes: The `producers` array is now derived from the OFF bulk DB and filtered to repeated UPC-prefix evidence for runtime use.
The `producerResearch` array remains the broader reference directory and now includes DB-backed prefix and brand observations for each producer.
entityIdExists reflects current `entities.json` canonical-name and alias coverage only; alias matches are not a separate legal-entity reconciliation pass.

_meta.producerSource: Runtime producers come from OFF bulk DB prefix aggregation filtered to repeated UPC evidence.
_meta.productSource: Runtime exact products come from OFF bulk DB product rows that match one existing producer seed and current entity ID.
